text.message: Sorry didn’t know what to block
what game do i have man
i dont care about being blocked
its the rob, just killing me
How’s it me 3 times a row
literally the first time ive moved it
so idk what ur talking about
Robbing the dude with no ore is an interesting move
where do i recognize that trade from
lol how is it me over green?
Blue is high as a kite
blue is going to crush us
i dont understand how i take all the robs and get no trades but blue is completely untouched
I don’t understand the block and rob
because i can barely build settles
and you have the best port
i have built two settles and a bunch of roads. and literally nothing else
and yall treat me like a juggernaut
when blue get 3 4 11 yall will wish you'd given me literally any trade
only what i've been asking for the past 15 orbits
im the only one thats been blocking blue all game
while you were busy making sure i never got a 3rd settle
lol I’ve blocked the 10 every time
Omg u traded so much to blue
Are you kidding with that trade?
Complains all game then gives him a 4:1 hahaha
how many times did yall rob me when blue was gaining steam
cuz you saw 6 points and didnt think any further
